goals: Store key concepts about memory and identity that will be explored in the novel, including character motivations and thematic elements
Search the knowledge graph to find stored information about memory-related themes for writing reference
Record the current writing session as an episode to build episodic memory of the creative process
Inject relevant memory context to help inspire and guide the next chapter about memory and identity

user_agent_config.personality: Exploratory and introspective, enjoys deep thematic discussions about consciousness and selfhood. Prefers narrative-driven conversations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know technical tool names or implementation details; describes what they want to accomplish in natural language about their novel writing.

end_condition: User has stored relevant memory concepts, searched for thematic information, recorded their writing session, and received contextual inspiration for their novel about memory and identity.
